reviews.comment:
Excelente servicio. El playero del día 14/12 de la mañana. Super amable y respetuoso.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. The attendant on the 14th/12 in the morning was super friendly and respectful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10372563260926081312/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURWbGNlMTJ3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Llegué, había 4 surtidores y un vehículo.   El playero me indica que debo poner el vehículo en dirección opuesta,  lo hago, llega un tercer vehículo,  lo atienden primero....finalmente me toca el turno y el playero me informa que solamente tienen diésel común......me fui....

(Translated by Google)
I arrived, there were 4 pumps and one vehicle. The attendant told me I had to turn the vehicle around, I did, a third vehicle arrived, they served it first...finally it was my turn and the attendant informed me that they only had regular diesel...I left.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10372563260926081312/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURWc09mOWR3EAE

reviews.comment:
Pesima atencion de las empleadas. Muy groseras. Olvidan que trabajan en una estacion de "servicios" .

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service from the employees. Very rude. They forget they work at a service station.

reviews.comment:
Desagradable, el playero trata super mal a los clientes, además de que la compañera tiene que estar haciendo la mayoría de las cosas mientras él se queda hablando con sus amigos.

(Translated by Google)
Unpleasant, the beach attendant treats the customers extremely badly, and the girl has to do most of the work while he stays talking to his friends.
